description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image with a selenium/standalone-chrome:latest service and defines a variable selenium_remote_url set to http://selenium__standalone-chrome:4444/wd/hub/. Add a global before_script that runs bundle install for all jobs. Define a cucumber job in the default test stage that executes the cucumber command. The pipeline has no additional caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
